student_name: João Guilherme da Costa e Silva
hub_subtitle: Business English técnico para reuniões com fornecedores internacionais, normas e entrevistas

lesson.menu_title: Diagnostic + Reactivation -- Who Is João Guilherme in English?
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself and your role on a kick-off call with an international supplier -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic + Reactivation
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- João Guilherme | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic + Reactivation

listenings.text: Hello João, this is Anna Weber from the signaling package. I am calling to confirm the date of the factory inspection in Berlin. We have finally sent the updated specification, so your team can start the review this week. The inspection is now planned for the second week of October, and the test report will follow within ten working days. Please bring the compliance checklist from your team, because we need to close the open points before we sign the acceptance certificate. If the date does not work for you, let me know by Friday and I will speak to our production manager. Thank you, and I look forward to seeing you in Berlin.

Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining the monthly status meeting. I want to start with the schedule. The first deliverable, the test report, is now three weeks late, and that delay puts pressure on our next milestone. The good news is that the specification has finally arrived and the design review is complete. I also want to be very clear about one point. The extra training sessions the client asked for are outside the scope of the contract, and we will treat them as a change request, not as a free service. Before the next inspection, I want a realistic deadline that every stakeholder can accept, not an optimistic one that we miss again. Compliance with the European standard is not negotiable, so let us build the plan around it.

tips: I'm a signaling engineer at Motiva.
I oversee the commissioning of the signaling system.

items.situation: "How long have you been in railway signaling?"
tips: I've worked in railway signaling for eight years.

items.situation: "Have you worked with international suppliers before?"
tips: I've been working with German, French and Chinese suppliers since 2019.

items.situation: "What did you do in San Francisco?"
tips: In 2023, I spent two months commissioning equipment in the field.

items.situation: "What is your main concern on this package?"
tips: My main concern is the deadline for the factory inspection.
We've been waiting for the specification since March.

items.situation: "Why do you want an international role?"
tips: The best roles in my field are abroad.
I want to be ready when the call comes.
